allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\4张源文件.fig"\); $header = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes[0..3]\); Write-Host "Header: $header"; Write-Host "File size: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes"; $hexHeader = \($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }\) -join " "; Write-Host "Hex: $hexHeader")
